archetypes.name: Capital Preservation
archetypes.tagline: Protect what you have. Every dollar matters.
archetypes.description: Designed for investors who cannot afford to lose principal — those near or in retirement, with immediate withdrawal needs, unstable income, or high emotional sensitivity to losses.

allocation.name: US Treasury Bills (3–6 month)
allocation.rationale: Near-zero duration risk with full US government backing.

allocation.name: TIPS 1–5 year
allocation.rationale: Principal adjusts with CPI, preserving real value.

allocation.name: Investment-grade corporate bonds (1–3 yr)
allocation.rationale: Yield pickup with minimal credit risk.

allocation.name: Brokered CDs — laddered
allocation.rationale: FDIC-insured with higher yield via maturity laddering.

allocation.name: Dividend ETF (SCHD)
allocation.rationale: High-quality dividend payers with strong balance sheets.

allocation.name: Utilities sector (XLU)
allocation.rationale: Regulated businesses with predictable cash flows.

allocation.name: Gold ETF (GLD)
allocation.rationale: Crisis hedge with negative correlation to equities.

dotcom2000.notes: Minimal equity exposure avoided worst of tech selloff

gfc2008.notes: Gold and T-bills offset credit spread widening

covid2020.notes: Brief March 2020 dip recovered within weeks

rateShock2022.notes: TIPS and floaters offset bond losses

archetypes.name: Conservative Income
archetypes.tagline: Live on your investments — don't gamble with them.
archetypes.description: Built for investors who need reliable income but can tolerate small temporary losses. Typically early retirees or those 3–7 years from full retirement.

allocation.name: Dividend growth (VIG)
allocation.rationale: Companies with 10+ years of dividend growth.

covid2020.notes: Sharp drop March 2020; recovered within 4 months

rateShock2022.notes: Intermediate bonds hurt; TIPS and gold partially offset

archetypes.name: Moderate Income
archetypes.tagline: Grow your wealth and collect income while you do it.
archetypes.description: A true all-weather portfolio for investors who want meaningful income today while growing assets for the future. Suitable for those 5–10 years from retirement.

allocation.name: Emerging market bonds (EMB)
allocation.rationale: EM sovereign bonds yielding 2–4% more than US Treasuries.

allocation.name: Quality factor (QUAL)
allocation.rationale: High ROE, low debt, stable earnings.

allocation.name: Dividend growth (VIG)
allocation.rationale: Dividend growth provides income and inflation protection.

allocation.name: Gold + Silver (IAU + SLV)
allocation.rationale: Gold as crisis hedge; silver adds industrial metal exposure.

allocation.name: Commodity ETF (PDBC)
allocation.rationale: Energy, agriculture, base metals — strong inflation hedge.

dotcom2000.notes: Diversified equity reduced tech concentration losses

gfc2008.notes: EM bonds and high-yield spread widening; significant but recoverable

rateShock2022.notes: Bond losses offset by TIPS and commodities

archetypes.name: Balanced Growth
archetypes.description: An evolved 60/40 portfolio for the modern investor. Incorporates alternatives, global diversification, and factor tilts to improve risk-adjusted returns.

allocation.name: Short-duration high-yield (SJNK)
allocation.rationale: Short maturity reduces interest rate risk.

allocation.name: EM local currency bonds (EMLC)
allocation.rationale: Currency diversification and exposure to EM rate cycles.

allocation.name: TIPS all-maturity (TIP)
allocation.rationale: Full-curve TIPS provides comprehensive inflation protection.

allocation.name: Convertible securities (ICVT)
allocation.rationale: Participates in ~70% of equity gains while absorbing ~50% of losses.

allocation.name: International developed (VXUS)
allocation.rationale: Valuation discount implies better prospective returns.

allocation.name: Emerging markets (VWO)
allocation.rationale: 3.5 billion consumers moving into middle class.

allocation.name: Technology & innovation (QQQ)
allocation.rationale: Productivity engine of the global economy.

allocation.name: Private REIT (VNQ)
allocation.rationale: Commercial real estate without public market volatility.

allocation.name: Gold + Bitcoin (1–2%)
allocation.rationale: Gold as crisis hedge; small Bitcoin allocation for asymmetric upside.

dotcom2000.notes: Tech overweight hurts but international cushioned losses

covid2020.notes: Sharp drop with rapid recovery; clean energy surged

rateShock2022.notes: Commodities and alternatives were significant buffers

archetypes.name: Growth Oriented
archetypes.tagline: Patience and discipline build real wealth.
archetypes.description: For investors with long time horizons, stable income, and the emotional fortitude to weather 30–40% drawdowns. Appropriate for investors 10+ years from retirement.

allocation.name: Short TIPS (inflation insurance)
allocation.rationale: Minimal fixed income serving purely as inflation insurance.

allocation.name: EM high-yield (EMHY)
allocation.rationale: Higher-yielding EM debt with equity-like risk/return.

allocation.name: US total market (VTI)
allocation.rationale: Foundation of any US equity portfolio.

allocation.name: Global infrastructure (IFRA)
allocation.rationale: Data centers, grid modernization, water systems.

allocation.name: Private equity (interval fund)
allocation.rationale: 3–5% annual alpha over public markets historically.

allocation.name: Critical minerals (XLE + PICK)
allocation.rationale: Uranium, copper demand projected to double by 2035.

dotcom2000.notes: Tech overweight painful; EM and small cap also sold off

gfc2008.notes: Full market exposure; recovery took 3–4 years

covid2020.notes: Deepest drawdown but fastest recovery; tech surged

archetypes.name: Aggressive Growth
archetypes.tagline: Wealth is built through concentration and time.
archetypes.description: A high-conviction, growth-maximizing portfolio for investors with long time horizons (10+ years), high income stability, and proven psychological ability to hold through deep drawdowns.

allocation.name: Emerging markets (INDA + VNM)
allocation.rationale: India in early stages of growth trajectory.

allocation.name: Semiconductor and AI (SOXX)
allocation.rationale: NVIDIA, AMD, ASML, TSMC — entire compute supply chain.

allocation.name: Biotech and genomics (XBI + ARKG)
allocation.rationale: Gene editing, precision oncology, AI-aided drug discovery.

allocation.name: Bitcoin ETF (7% position)
allocation.rationale: Meaningful position contributing significantly in bull cycles.

allocation.name: Venture capital (AngelList)
allocation.rationale: Highest risk, highest return asset class.

covid2020.notes: Fastest recovery ever; BTC and tech surged

rateShock2022.notes: Growth stocks most impacted; BTC fell ~75%

archetypes.name: Maximum Growth
archetypes.tagline: Compounding at maximum velocity. Not for the faint-hearted.
archetypes.description: The highest-risk, highest-potential portfolio. For young investors with decades of runway, very high income stability, and demonstrated ability to hold through 60%+ losses.

allocation.name: India + Southeast Asia (INDA + VNM)
allocation.rationale: Greatest growth story of the next 30 years.

allocation.name: Semiconductor and AI (SOXX + ASML)
allocation.rationale: AI requires exponentially more compute each generation.

allocation.name: Frontier markets (FM ETF)
allocation.rationale: Nigeria, Vietnam, Bangladesh at same stage as China in 1995.

allocation.name: Bitcoin — core position
allocation.rationale: 10% sized to deliver significant portfolio impact.

allocation.name: Ethereum and Layer-1 blockchain
allocation.rationale: Global settlement layer for decentralized finance.

covid2020.notes: Steep drop followed by explosive recovery; BTC tripled

rateShock2022.notes: Growth + crypto double hit; BTC -77%, Nasdaq -33%
